quantity: Bombelli-Sorkin causal-set combinatorial dimension d_BS of the E8 foam
paper_refs: sec:percolation-V112 (methodological note on the retired Sim C)

ideal_cutproject_boxcount.note: ideal E8 icosian golden-ratio projection to 4D, box-counting

growth_ensemble_mature_foam.note: framework growth dynamics (seed C3, tetrahedral-balance admission, growth-order causal DAG) through the same cut-and-project; THE Stratum-2 support

growth_incoherent_control.note: incoherent control: collapses (shows coherence is what yields 4D)

RETIRED_percolation_at_pc.note: partial-order probe at the bare critical density p_c (the originally-planned Sim B/C): measures the FRACTAL CRITICAL CLUSTER, the wrong object for the smooth Lorentzian order. RETIRED as the d_BS probe.

reading: The macroscopic 4D Lorentzian causal order is carried by the MATURE, over-percolated foam (d_BS ~ 4), not the sparse critical cluster at p_c (fractal d_BS ~ 3.6). The remaining numerical target is the mature foam's full Poisson universality (interval-cardinality ratios N2/N3, N3/N4).
